a1SeparatorLungCupFilter.name: A1 Separator Lung Cup Filter
a1SeparatorLungCupFilter.desc: Filters air from the separator output.

meniscusPumpReturnLine.name: Meniscus Pump Return Line
meniscusPumpReturnLine.desc: Returns ink to the feed pump.

meniscusPumpFeedLine.name: Meniscus Pump Feed Line
meniscusPumpFeedLine.desc: Supplies ink to the meniscus pump.

a2SeparatorMeniscusFLC.name: A2 Separator Meniscus FLC
a2SeparatorMeniscusFLC.desc: Controls flow to the meniscus pump.

a3SeparatormeniscusRLC.name: A3 Separator Meniscus RLC
a3SeparatormeniscusRLC.desc: Controls return flow from the meniscus pump.

f10Filter.name: F10 Filter
f10Filter.desc: Filters ink before the feed pump.

f2Filter.name: F2 Filter
f2Filter.desc: Filters ink before the purge pump.

twoWayMagneticValve.name: Two-Way Magnetic Valve
twoWayMagneticValve.desc: Directs flow between the meniscus pump and the purge pump.

threeWayMagneticValve.name: Three-Way Magnetic Valve
threeWayMagneticValve.desc: Directs flow between the meniscus pump, purge pump, and waste.
